select_when: An argument sounds persuasive before it is valid and the inference structure needs to be checked explicitly.
Decision quality depends on separating evidence quality from presentation quality before resources are committed.
The team needs disciplined challenge of premises, causal links, or burden of proof.
A recommendation may be hiding overgeneralization, bad causality, or framework misuse under confident rhetoric.
avoid_when: Fallacy hunting is being used performatively to score debate points instead of clarifying the decision or action path.
The situation primarily requires relationship repair or implementation design rather than another round of argumentative nitpicking.

curation_notes.summary: Centered the model on explicit logic checking, weak inference detection, and disciplined challenge of evidence chains.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 4 or import donor-shaped higher-order semantics in this coverage batch.
Kept the routing surface conservative so Layer 2B stays canonical and Waves 2 to 4 stay preview-only.
open_questions: Wave 4 candidacy stays observational only for this batch.

select_when.note: Select conditions stay close to the source activation language and are compressed only enough for routing use.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions preserve the source anti-patterns and misuse warnings with conservative normalization.

input_type.note: The typed input label is a reviewed routing compression of the source context.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention shape implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning taxonomy labels are normalized onto the existing Layer 2B vocabulary.
